painPoints.title: Still managing cloud costs by gut feeling?
painPoints.subtitle: Diagnose the three structural problems most teams face. The waste you don't notice is the most expensive waste.

howItWorks.defaultSubtitle: From setup to savings, one day is all it takes. Start cost optimization in three simple steps — no complex configuration required.

finops.defaultTitle: Stop relying on spreadsheets. Let AI autopilot your cloud costs.
finops.defaultSubtitle: Transform three chronic inefficiencies your team faces every day into an automated To-Be state. Each item is backed by real Before/After data from deployed enterprises.

asIs.title: Manual Spreadsheet Tracking
asIs.description: Budget overruns are discovered only after receiving end-of-month invoices. You never see them coming.

toBe.title: AI-Integrated Dashboard
toBe.description: Role-based (CTO/CFO) dashboards deliver 100% transparent visibility instantly.

asIs.title: Commitment Coverage Leakage
asIs.description: Failed RI/SP management leaves idle instances bleeding budget.

toBe.title: 24/7 Automated Commitment Management
toBe.description: Real-time usage analysis maintains 100% commitment coverage with zero waste.

asIs.title: Noisy Alert Overload
asIs.description: Meaningless duplicate alerts cause critical cost surge incidents to go unnoticed.

toBe.title: Smart Cost Anomaly Detection
toBe.description: Only the critical 5% of actionable alerts get through — preventing issues before they escalate.

coreEngines.title: The Core Engines Behind Real Savings
coreEngines.subtitle: {PartnerName}'s three engines fully automate the complex savings process.

engines.title: AI Cost Prediction
engines.description: Combines historical consumption patterns with service growth rates to precisely forecast cloud costs 90 days out. You'll know before budgets are breached.
checks: Early warning alerts for cost surge patterns

engines.title: Automated Savings Recommendations
engines.description: From idle EC2 to oversized RDS instances to unnecessary EBS snapshots — hundreds of actionable savings opportunities are automatically queued by priority.
checks: Safe mode → rollback in under 1 minute

engines.title: Multi-Cloud Integration
engines.description: Manage AWS, Azure, and GCP costs from a single dashboard. Compare vendor pricing and automatically calculate savings when relocating workloads.

roleBasedValue.title: Dashboards Optimized for Your Role
roleBasedValue.subtitle: {PartnerName} speaks the language of every role — CTO, DevOps, and CFO. Same data, viewed differently for each.
roleBasedValue.ctaSubtitle: We'll calculate your potential savings at no cost.

personas.label: CTO
personas.headline: Achieve technical strategy and cost efficiency simultaneously
personas.description: Diagnose the structural waste drivers in your cloud architecture. Automate team-level cost accountability and budget governance so you can focus on the technical roadmap.
benefits: Real-time cloud cost overview for your entire org on a single screen
Pre-deployment cost impact simulation for architecture decisions
personas.quote: "We used to spend half a day every quarter explaining the AWS bill. Now it takes 5 minutes with the {PartnerName} dashboard."

personas.label: DevOps
personas.headline: Automate infrastructure operations efficiency like code
personas.description: Automatically detect cost anomalies without on-call, and integrate with Terraform/Pulumi pipelines to preview cost impact before infrastructure changes go live.
benefits: Automatic cost change annotations on Terraform/Pulumi PRs
Instant Slack alerts when thresholds are breached
personas.quote: "No more 2am alerts about storage cost spikes. {PartnerName} catches them first."

personas.label: CFO
personas.headline: Turn cloud budget into a predictable fixed cost
personas.description: Convert volatile cloud billing into a budget-plannable structure. Automatically generate cost reports and ROI analysis that finance teams can directly understand.
benefits: Automated cloud cost classification and aggregation by accounting standards
Monthly budget vs. actual reports by department and project
Optimal RI/SP portfolio recommendations timed to contract renewals
One-click export of cost evidence documents for audits
personas.quote: "Cloud costs have shifted from a simple expense line to a strategically managed investment."
